entities.name: User
entities.description: Registered user identified by phone number

attributes.name: phone_number
attributes.description: User phone number for registration and login

attributes.name: phone_verified_at
attributes.description: Timestamp when phone number was verified

entities.name: UserProfile
entities.description: User profile details for display and discovery

attributes.name: info_text
attributes.description: Short profile status or info text

attributes.name: profile_image_url
attributes.description: Location of the uploaded profile image

attributes.name: qr_code_value
attributes.description: Encoded value for profile QR code

attributes.name: show_phone
attributes.description: Flag to display phone number on profile

entities.name: UserAuthMethod
entities.description: Authentication methods for a user such as PIN, biometric, or passkey

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Primary key for the auth method

attributes.name: is_enabled
attributes.description: Indicates if this method is enabled

attributes.name: last_used_at
attributes.description: Timestamp when method was last used

entities.name: Device
entities.description: User device session for multi-device access

attributes.description: Hashed session token for device login

attributes.name: last_seen_at
attributes.description: Last activity timestamp for the device

attributes.description: Primary key for the encryption key

attributes.name: is_active
attributes.description: Indicates if the key is active

entities.name: Chat

attributes.description: User who created or owns the chat

attributes.description: Indicates if the chat is locked with extra authentication

attributes.description: Version for concurrent updates to chat settings

attributes.name: updated_at

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Text content of the message if applicable

attributes.name: is_ephemeral

attributes.name: version
attributes.description: Version for concurrent edits of the message

attributes.name: updated_at
attributes.description: Timestamp when the message was last updated

glossary.definition: Two-factor authentication using a secondary factor such as a PIN
Passwordless authentication credential based on public key cryptography
Extracted metadata used to render a preview of a URL
Sending a single message to multiple recipients
Text containing basic formatting like bold or italics
Explicit reference to a user in a group message using @ syntax
Shareable link that allows users to join a group
Encryption where only sender and recipient can decrypt messages
Record of delivery or read status for a message
Metadata for attached media such as stickers, GIFs, audio, or link previews
A contact not recognized from the user’s address book, handled separately.
Privacy setting that controls who can see the user's last online status.
Metadata representation of a URL shared in a message.
End-to-end encryption where only sender and recipient can read message content
AI-generated suggested replies based on conversation context
Rate at which media or messages are processed or transferred
Automatic switch to standby components during failures
Record of message delivery status per recipient
Maximum allowable error rate within a time window.
Client device registered for messaging access.
Maximum acceptable data loss measured in time
Maximum acceptable downtime measured in time
